UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile information representing whether they are a Shopkeeper or a Job Seeker.

id.description: The unique user ID matching their Firebase Authentication UID

role.description: The role of the user inside the app

skills.description: Skills of the job seeker (comma-separated or text)

createdAt.description: The standard server timestamp when the profile was generated

ShopJob.title: ShopJob
ShopJob.description: A job opening posted by a shopkeeper detailing the shop and requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier of the job post

shopType.description: Type of shop (e.g., Grocery, Bakery, Boutique, Electronics)

location.description: Physical address or location of the shop

expectedSkills.description: Required skills or qualities from workers

salaryEstimate.description: Salary details, estimated monthly amount or range

description.description: General description of the job role and shop

createdBy.description: The User ID of the shopkeeper who created this listing

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this listing was posted

isActive.description: Whether the job position is active

JobApplication.title: JobApplication
JobApplication.description: An application submitted by a seeker for a posted shop job.

shopName.description: Denormalized shop name for direct query viewing

shopLocation.description: Denormalized shop location for easier list reference

applicantId.description: User ID of the job seeker who applied

applicantName.description: Full name of the job seeker applicant

coverLetter.description: Cover letter text or brief notes from applicant

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the application was sent

/userProfiles/{userId}.description: Contains user registration profiles mapped by authentication UID

/shopJobs/{jobId}.description: Contains job vacancies created by shopkeepers

/jobApplications/{applicationId}.description: Contains job applications filed by job seekers
